CREATE TABLE myschema.mytable (my_num_column INT, my_string_column STRING);
ALTER TABLE myschema.mytable SET READ ONLY;
CREATE IMPRINTS INDEX my_impr_idx ON myschema.mytable (my_num_column);
CREATE IMPRINTS INDEX my_string_idx ON myschema.mytable (my_string_column);
CREATE IMPRINTS INDEX single_index ON myschema.mytable (my_num_column);
CREATE TABLE myschema.another_table (another_num_column INT);
CREATE IMPRINTS INDEX another_idx ON myschema.another_table (another_num_column);
CREATE IMPRINTS INDEX complex_idx ON myschema.mytable (my_string_column);
CREATE INDEX my_regular_idx ON myschema.mytable (my_num_column);
CREATE IMPRINTS INDEX overlapping_idx ON myschema.mytable (my_num_column);
CREATE TABLE myschema.read_only_table (column_a INT, column_b STRING);
ALTER TABLE myschema.read_only_table SET READ ONLY;
CREATE IMPRINTS INDEX read_only_idx ON myschema.read_only_table (column_a);
DROP INDEX my_impr_idx;
DROP INDEX my_string_idx;
DROP INDEX another_idx;
DROP INDEX complex_idx;
CREATE IMPRINTS INDEX limit_test_idx ON myschema.mytable (my_num_column);
CREATE IMPRINTS INDEX boundary_test_idx ON myschema.read_only_table (column_b);
CREATE IMPRINTS INDEX unique_index ON myschema.mytable (my_string_column);
CREATE IMPRINTS INDEX multi_column_idx ON myschema.mytable (my_num_column);
CREATE IMPRINTS INDEX test_idx ON myschema.read_only_table (column_a);
CREATE IMPRINTS INDEX high_vol_index ON myschema.mytable (my_num_column);
